TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == datay == datay , mauzip i isasa' nu buyu, caay katakalaw nu bayu'. yadah i enal. kya kilang sa, hali pasanga' tu pana'. atekak ku kilang. katuud tu pacakay tu kilang atu sapal a pacakayay.yadah ku ngangan kina kilang. taneng tu paazih, palangat i liwliw nu luma'. u siwkay nu nipaluma bulad kama bulad kama, mitesekay a nipangangna : Murraya paniculata, duma a ngangansa u datay han, siwaay datay , cacay a bataan datay , malebut datay, mang datay, siwaay balangbangan datay, mamin ku buyubuyuan bangesis a datay, siwaay kilang datay,malebut mata, mang mata nitii'kan, malebut ciid sipapahay, angtulay malebut a mata, adidiay mang sumilaway kilang, sumilaway kilang a bangsis, sepatay puu' bangsis, sepat puu' kama, seling a datay, sehun hatiza. (kamu nu Hulam:śúąś©ė,Ś≠łŚźć:Murraya paniculata. , .) u datay nu papah anu metmeten, idawk u micidekay a bangsis mahida u kama mami ku sanek, kiyu pituay a datay han, u icucuwa tu masanek ku bangsi nida sananay, duma pangangan sa bulad kama. (kamu nu Hulam: "śúąś°Ē","śúąś©ė".) u ing-ciang-ke a kaput, siwaay datay su a nipaluma, u balu nu bulad kama kapah cekceken patahekal tu simal, sapisanga' tu bangsisay simal, u balu atu maduhemay a heci kapah kanen, pawalien maacakay a balu hidaen u uciya sengelen malunananuman, yu mukasi sa, u kakitaan hanu u pudac nu bulad kama atu cica' nu kilang, palamelen tu yasiyang hananay padengen i masapululay sipabangsi tu dikuc. (kamu nu Hulam: .) ya kilang nida atekak kapah sipisanga' tu cungkul, ina, sakaluk nu malukay atu kawes nu takini', idaw ku nu tademaw a nipaluma sasalangatan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kasibaluan Kasibaluan nu datay, i sepatay a bulad ktukuh siwaay a bulad , kasihecian siwaay a bulad ktukuh sabaw tusaay a bulad. bulad kama a balu nida idaw ku micidek a sanenk nu bangsis. u bangsis niza mabahil tayda i mabaatbaatay kiyu idaw ku pituay a datay, siwaay a datay, cacay a bataan a datay, malebut a datay, emang a datay, kiyu pangangan cili-siang han. (kamu nu Hulam: .) lakalakan atu kakitidaan kauzipan sayaway a lalangawan i timulan nu Ya-cu , ayda malakalak i Tay-wan , Cung-ku , Liw-kiw , Hu-li-pin ..., itini i Cung-ku malakalak i Hay-nan , Kuang-tung , kakaudipan i namakabayu' ku sausi, i talakaway a buyu', i malahatay a kilang atu kilakilangan nu labu atu isasaay masawahelulay nu labu. manamuh tu alihaay suesuemetay a demiad, matalaw tu cueded, u sakapahay a nilangaw a undu sa i tusa a bataan katukuh i tusa a bataan izaw ku walu a undu, hinaadih i baebaetuan, i masa uncungay a bukelalan idaw tu malakalak itiza, ayda nu tademaw a nipaluma sapisalangat. maydih a paluma tu datay sa, pahecek han kapah tu, atu mahida nu paanip a pacelak a paluma, anu talakaw padeng mihacacay han mipenec a pacelak. pahecek han ku yadahay, nika sapahecek a kaway anu hida nu sapul kasenun sa tabaki malakilang tu, kyu katuuday a tademaw hida u sapul ku nipaluma niheni. (kamu nu Hulam: .) cilekay u misatalay a cilekay u engid misangida mutabu tu papah kiyu misadibu matabun ku papah sisimal siwacah a imelang, u kataylulu nu wawa micidek misanganga i angangan palawacu tu teban atu nikasibalu . (kamu nu Hulam: .) misitekeday a wayway bulad kama(datay) sa, u mihmihcaan sumilaway a kilang atu adidiay a kilang a nipalumma, talakaw sa cacay katukuh cacay a bataan a ii , u satalakaw nida makaalatu sawbaw tusa a kung-ce . (kamu nu Hulam: .) u kilang atu ciid macelah tu takuliyaway atu nuabuwan sisalengaay a kulit, idaw adidi' ku tamelac malikat, nayay ku banuh, nikalaliwasak nu ciid makudikudic tanayu sa yadah,adidiay masakimulu, u mabalatay mahida u tulaay sikalimucuay, ya saisasaay micapi tu masakimuluay a kaku, u kilang nida atekak. u balu nu datay u salengacay ku kulit nu balu niza, lima ku pihpih nu balu, i papabawan atu tapiingan nu akaway mucelak ku balu, masakawsuwa mucebal azihen ku balu kyu siey-sing-hwa-si han. salengacay a balu i tukun nu tangah, lalima ku pihpih mahida u tukiay, micungedus ku bangesis, kanahatu i pituay, cacay a bataan, katukuh malebut ku kabaat masanek ku bangesis niza, kiyu pangangan han tu ci-li-siang . yu mapelu' tu ku balu sa, tahekal ku mahidaay u tiekuk mahida u miladidtay, u caayay henay ka duhem a heci sumilaway ku kulit, maduhem satu namaka sumilaway mala nu kama a kulit. u datay kapah saiten maladumdumaay ku hekal nu wayway nida, kiyu hina adih i putaputahan mala langat nu liwliw nu luma'. u heci mahida u nuli, mahida u tiekuk kasakimulu, nu ayawan masadicem, anu maduhem sa na u sumilaway henay mala takuliyaway alaw mala sumahahay tu ku kulit, yadahay sa anu maacak mabuhecul nika u teban masadibu maselen sisimal, tanayu yaku cacay ktukuh tusa a Kung-bun , ahebal lima katukuh sabaw sepat a Kung-li , tabaki tu adidi tabaki ku sumad, ya sapalumaan cacay tu tusa, azihen ku pudac sa simahidaay u sikupaay a banuh. (kamu nu Hulam: .) micidekay a cacukaymasen datay, balu atu heci kapah kanen, u balu banawen sa pawalinen, kapah sipauciya malanum atu sipalamel misakabi tu lami' u kapahay a sapabangesis. caay kahatini a cacay, kapah sipisanga' tu sapabangsis a simal, u bangesi nu nalu mitalaw ku likes atu lalangaw, mamin ku kulang sakala sapaiyu, yu namapateku sumilaw sa, kapah sapaculil tu idang masusud ku nika tekuan. nu labu nu udip a sapaiyu sa, mikapah tu bituka a adada, makahung adada ku ukak, u datay a zayliw nu sapaiyu kapahay, kapah sapisanga' tu sapisakakawaw nu malukay, sipisanga' tu cungkul, ina, u kapahay a zayliw ku datay. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u sapaiyu sapihica bulad kama(datay) u papah atu mangaduay a ciid ku sasanga'an malasapaiyu, u sanek aledah, adidi ku akenek, dihemay, idaw adidi ku duku, u balucu, atay, bala, u cayay katatudung nu udip amana picukaymas, mahiniay sapisanga' tu sapaiyu a zayliw i Kuwang-si , Kuwang-tung , Hu-cyin a kakitidaan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kapahay a kakitidaan datay sa, sakapahay padengen i sicilalay, kapahay ku hekal nu bali a kakitidaan, i liwliw nu luma' mapacilalay a kakitidaan, kiya kapah ku nilangaw nicelak nida, u papah sumilaw takelal sa. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam śúąś©ė yuechu śúąś©ė(Ś≠łŚźć:Murraya paniculata), ,Á®ģŚä†Ť©ěpaniculata śĄŹÁāļ"ŚúďťĆźŤäĪŚļŹŚľŹÁöĄ". u sulit nu Lipun „ā≤„ÉÉ„ā≠„ÉĄ(śúąś©ė,Murraya paniculata) . u sulit nu Amilika Murraya paniculata is a tropical, evergreen plant native to southern China, Taiwan, the Indian sub-continent (i.e. Bangladesh, India, Nepal, north-eastern Pakistan and Sri Lanka), south-eastern Asia (i.e. Cambodia, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, Malaysia and the Philippines and northern Australia (i.e. the northern parts of the Northern Territory, far northern Queensland and northern Western Australia), bearing small, white, scented flowers, which is grown as an ornamental tree or hedge. Murraya is closely related to Citrus, and bears small orange to red fruit resembling kumquats, though some cultivars do not set fruit.
S.PHON: == dataj == dataj , mauzip i isasa Ē~ ° nu buju, ¶aaj katakar~…ĺaw nu baju Ē~ °. jadańß i …ônar~…ĺ. kja kir~…ĺaŇč sa, ńßar~…ĺi pasaŇča Ē~ ° tu pana Ē~ °. at…ôkak ku kir~…ĺaŇč. katuud tu pa ¶akaj tu kir~…ĺaŇč atu sapar~…ĺ a pa ¶akajaj.jadańß ku ŇčaŇčan kina kir~…ĺaŇč. tan…ôŇč tu paazińß, par~…ĺaŇčat i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma bur~…ĺad kama bur~…ĺad kama, mit…ôs…ôkaj a nipaŇčaŇčna : murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata, duma a ŇčaŇčansa u dataj ńßan, siwaaj dataj , ¶a ¶aj a bataan dataj , mar~…ĺ…ôbut dataj, maŇč dataj, siwaaj bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan dataj, mamin ku bujubujuan baŇč…ôsis a dataj, siwaaj kir~…ĺaŇč dataj,mar~…ĺ…ôbut mata, maŇč mata nitii Ē~ °kan, mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶iid sipapańßaj, aŇčtur~…ĺaj mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mata, adidiaj maŇč sumir~…ĺawaj kir~…ĺaŇč, sumir~…ĺawaj kir~…ĺaŇč a baŇčsis, s…ôpataj puu Ē~ ° baŇčsis, s…ôpat puu Ē~ ° kama, s…ôr~…ĺiŇč a dataj, s…ôńßun ńßatiza. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**,**:murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata. , .) u dataj nu papańß anu m…ôtm…ôt…ôn, idawk u mi ¶id…ôkaj a baŇčsis mańßida u kama mami ku san…ôk, kiju pituaj a dataj ńßan, u i ¶u ¶uwa tu masan…ôk ku baŇčsi nida sananaj, duma paŇčaŇčan sa bur~…ĺad kama. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: "**","**".) u iŇč- ¶iaŇč-k…ô a kaput, siwaaj dataj su a nipar~…ĺuma, u bar~…ĺu nu bur~…ĺad kama kapańß ¶…ôk ¶…ôk…ôn patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu simar~…ĺ, sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu baŇčsisaj simar~…ĺ, u bar~…ĺu atu maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i kapańß kan…ôn, pawar~…ĺi…ôn maa ¶akaj a bar~…ĺu ńßida…ôn u u ¶ija s…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôn mar~…ĺunananuman, ju mukasi sa, u kakitaan ńßanu u puda ¶ nu bur~…ĺad kama atu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇč, par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ…ôn tu jasijaŇč ńßananaj pad…ôŇč…ôn i masapur~…ĺur~…ĺaj sipabaŇčsi tu diku ¶. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ja kir~…ĺaŇč nida at…ôkak kapańß sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶uŇčkur~…ĺ, ina, sakar~…ĺuk nu mar~…ĺukaj atu kaw…ôs nu takini Ē~ °, idaw ku nu tad…ômaw a nipar~…ĺuma sasar~…ĺaŇčatan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kasibar~…ĺuan kasibar~…ĺuan nu dataj, i s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad ktukuńß siwaaj a bur~…ĺad , kasińß…ô ¶ian siwaaj a bur~…ĺad ktukuńß sabaw tusaaj a bur~…ĺad. bur~…ĺad kama a bar~…ĺu nida idaw ku mi ¶id…ôk a san…ônk nu baŇčsis. u baŇčsis niza mabańßir~…ĺ tajda i mabaatbaataj kiju idaw ku pituaj a dataj, siwaaj a dataj, ¶a ¶aj a bataan a dataj, mar~…ĺ…ôbut a dataj, …ômaŇč a dataj, kiju paŇčaŇčan ¶ir~…ĺi-siaŇč ńßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) r~…ĺakar~…ĺakan atu kakitidaan kauzipan sajawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan i timur~…ĺan nu ja- ¶u , ajda mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i taj-wan , ¶uŇč-ku , r~…ĺiw-kiw , ńßu-r~…ĺi-pin ..., itini i ¶uŇč-ku mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i ńßaj-nan , kuaŇč-tuŇč , kakaudipan i namakabaju Ē~ ° ku sausi, i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, i mar~…ĺańßataj a kir~…ĺaŇč atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nu r~…ĺabu atu isasaaj masawańß…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺabu. manamuńß tu ar~…ĺińßaaj su…ôsu…ôm…ôtaj a d…ômiad, matar~…ĺaw tu ¶u…ôd…ôd, u sakapańßaj a nir~…ĺaŇčaw a undu sa i tusa a bataan katukuńß i tusa a bataan izaw ku war~…ĺu a undu, ńßinaadińß i ba…ôba…ôtuan, i masa un ¶uŇčaj a buk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan idaw tu mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak itiza, ajda nu tad…ômaw a nipar~…ĺuma sapisar~…ĺaŇčat. majdińß a par~…ĺuma tu dataj sa, pańß…ô ¶…ôk ńßan kapańß tu, atu mańßida nu paanip a pa ¶…ôr~…ĺak a par~…ĺuma, anu tar~…ĺakaw pad…ôŇč mińßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan mip…ôn…ô ¶ a pa ¶…ôr~…ĺak. pańß…ô ¶…ôk ńßan ku jadańßaj, nika sapańß…ô ¶…ôk a kawaj anu ńßida nu sapur~…ĺ kas…ônun sa tabaki mar~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇč tu, kju katuudaj a tad…ômaw ńßida u sapur~…ĺ ku nipar~…ĺuma nińß…ôni. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj u misatar~…ĺaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj u …ôŇčid misaŇčida mutabu tu papańß kiju misadibu matabun ku papańß sisimar~…ĺ siwa ¶ańß a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u katajr~…ĺur~…ĺu nu wawa mi ¶id…ôk misaŇčaŇča i aŇčaŇčan par~…ĺawa ¶u tu t…ôban atu nikasibar~…ĺu . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) misit…ôk…ôdaj a wajwaj bur~…ĺad kama(dataj) sa, u mińßmińß ¶aan sumir~…ĺawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč atu adidiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč a nipar~…ĺumma, tar~…ĺakaw sa ¶a ¶aj katukuńß ¶a ¶aj a bataan a ii , u satar~…ĺakaw nida makaar~…ĺatu sawbaw tusa a kuŇč- ¶…ô . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u kir~…ĺaŇč atu ¶iid ma ¶…ôr~…ĺańß tu takur~…ĺijawaj atu nuabuwan sisar~…ĺ…ôŇčaaj a kur~…ĺit, idaw adidi Ē~ ° ku tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺikat, najaj ku banuńß, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak nu ¶iid makudikudi ¶ tanaju sa jadańß,adidiaj masakimur~…ĺu, u mabar~…ĺataj mańßida u tur~…ĺaaj sikar~…ĺimu ¶uaj, ja saisasaaj mi ¶api tu masakimur~…ĺuaj a kaku, u kir~…ĺaŇč nida at…ôkak. u bar~…ĺu nu dataj u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit nu bar~…ĺu niza, r~…ĺima ku pińßpińß nu bar~…ĺu, i papabawan atu tapiiŇčan nu akawaj mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu, masakawsuwa mu ¶…ôbar~…ĺ azińß…ôn ku bar~…ĺu kju si…ô-siŇč-ńßwa-si ńßan. sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a bar~…ĺu i tukun nu taŇčańß, r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku pińßpińß mańßida u tukiaj, mi ¶uŇč…ôdus ku baŇč…ôsis, kanańßatu i pituaj, ¶a ¶aj a bataan, katukuńß mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku kabaat masan…ôk ku baŇč…ôsis niza, kiju paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶i-r~…ĺi-siaŇč . ju map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu ku bar~…ĺu sa, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku mańßidaaj u ti…ôkuk mańßida u mir~…ĺadidtaj, u ¶aajaj ńß…ônaj ka duńß…ôm a ńß…ô ¶i sumir~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit, maduńß…ôm satu namaka sumir~…ĺawaj mar~…ĺa nu kama a kur~…ĺit. u dataj kapańß sait…ôn mar~…ĺadumdumaaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu wajwaj nida, kiju ńßina adińß i putaputańßan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺaŇčat nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. u ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u nur~…ĺi, mańßida u ti…ôkuk kasakimur~…ĺu, nu ajawan masadi ¶…ôm, anu maduńß…ôm sa na u sumir~…ĺawaj ńß…ônaj mar~…ĺa takur~…ĺijawaj ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺa sumańßańßaj tu ku kur~…ĺit, jadańßaj sa anu maa ¶ak mabuńß…ô ¶ur~…ĺ nika u t…ôban masadibu mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôn sisimar~…ĺ, tanaju jaku ¶a ¶aj ktukuńß tusa a kuŇč-bun , ańß…ôbar~…ĺ r~…ĺima katukuńß sabaw s…ôpat a kuŇč-r~…ĺi , tabaki tu adidi tabaki ku sumad, ja sapar~…ĺumaan ¶a ¶aj tu tusa, azińß…ôn ku puda ¶ sa simańßidaaj u sikupaaj a banuńß. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶a ¶ukajmas…ôn dataj, bar~…ĺu atu ńß…ô ¶i kapańß kan…ôn, u bar~…ĺu banaw…ôn sa pawar~…ĺin…ôn, kapańß sipau ¶ija mar~…ĺanum atu sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ misakabi tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° u kapańßaj a sapabaŇč…ôsis. ¶aaj kańßatini a ¶a ¶aj, kapańß sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapabaŇčsis a simar~…ĺ, u baŇč…ôsi nu nar~…ĺu mitar~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺik…ôs atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw, mamin ku kur~…ĺaŇč sakar~…ĺa sapaiju, ju namapat…ôku sumir~…ĺaw sa, kapańß sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu idaŇč masusud ku nika t…ôkuan. nu r~…ĺabu nu udip a sapaiju sa, mikapańß tu bituka a adada, makańßuŇč adada ku ukak, u dataj a zajr~…ĺiw nu sapaiju kapańßaj, kapańß sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapisakakawaw nu mar~…ĺukaj, sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶uŇčkur~…ĺ, ina, u kapańßaj a zajr~…ĺiw ku dataj. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u sapaiju sapińßi ¶a bur~…ĺad kama(dataj) u papańß atu maŇčaduaj a ¶iid ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an mar~…ĺasapaiju, u san…ôk ar~…ĺ…ôdańß, adidi ku ak…ôn…ôk, dińß…ômaj, idaw adidi ku duku, u bar~…ĺu ¶u, ataj, bar~…ĺa, u ¶ajaj katatuduŇč nu udip amana pi ¶ukajmas, mańßiniaj sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapaiju a zajr~…ĺiw i kuwaŇč-si , kuwaŇč-tuŇč , ńßu- ¶jin a kakitidaan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kapańßaj a kakitidaan dataj sa, sakapańßaj pad…ôŇč…ôn i si ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj, kapańßaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi a kakitidaan, i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj a kakitidaan, kija kapańß ku nir~…ĺaŇčaw ni ¶…ôr~…ĺak nida, u papańß sumir~…ĺaw tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ** ju…ô ¶ńßu **(**:murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata), ,***pani ¶ur~…ĺata **"******". u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun ****(**,murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata) . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata is a tropi ¶ar~…ĺ, …ô*…ôrgr…ô…ôn pr~…ĺant nati*…ô to soutńß…ôrn ¶ńßina, taiwan, tńß…ô indian sub- ¶ontin…ônt (i.…ô. baŇčr~…ĺad…ôsńß, india, n…ôpar~…ĺ, nortńß-…ôast…ôrn pakistan and sri r~…ĺanka), soutńß-…ôast…ôrn asia (i.…ô. ¶ambodia, r~…ĺaos, mjanmar, tńßair~…ĺand, *i…ôtnam, indon…ôsia, mar~…ĺajsia and tńß…ô pńßir~…ĺippin…ôs and nortńß…ôrn austrar~…ĺia (i.…ô. tńß…ô nortńß…ôrn parts of tńß…ô nortńß…ôrn t…ôrritorj, far nortńß…ôrn *u…ô…ônsr~…ĺand and nortńß…ôrn w…ôst…ôrn austrar~…ĺia), b…ôariŇč smar~…ĺr~…ĺ, wńßit…ô, s ¶…ônt…ôd fr~…ĺow…ôrs, wńßi ¶ńß is grown as an ornam…ôntar~…ĺ tr…ô…ô or ńß…ôdg…ô. murraja is ¶r~…ĺos…ôr~…ĺj r…ôr~…ĺat…ôd to ¶itrus, and b…ôars smar~…ĺr~…ĺ oraŇč…ô to r…ôd fruit r…ôs…ômbr~…ĺiŇč kum*uats, tńßougńß som…ô ¶ur~…ĺti*ars do not s…ôt fruit.
S.FORM: == datay == datay , mauzip i isasa' nu buyu, caay katakalaw nu bayu'. yadah i enal. kya kilang sa, hali pasanga' tu pana'. atekak ku kilang. katuud tu pacakay tu kilang atu sapal a pacakayay.yadah ku ngangan kina kilang. taneng tu paazih, palangat i liwliw nu luma'. u siwkay nu nipaluma bulad kama bulad kama, mitesekay a nipangangna : Murraya paniculata, duma a ngangansa u datay han, siwaay datay , cacay a bataan datay , malebut datay, mang datay, siwaay balangbangan datay, mamin ku buyubuyuan bangesis a datay, siwaay kilang datay,malebut mata, mang mata nitii'kan, malebut ciid sipapahay, angtulay malebut a mata, adidiay mang sumilaway kilang, sumilaway kilang a bangsis, sepatay puu' bangsis, sepat puu' kama, seling a datay, sehun hatiza. (kamu nu Hulam:śúąś©ė,Ś≠łŚźć:Murraya paniculata. , .) u datay nu papah anu metmeten, idawk u micidekay a bangsis mahida u kama mami ku sanek, kiyu pituay a datay han, u icucuwa tu masanek ku bangsi nida sananay, duma pangangan sa bulad kama. (kamu nu Hulam: "śúąś°Ē","śúąś©ė".) u ing-ciang-ke a kaput, siwaay datay su a nipaluma, u balu nu bulad kama kapah cekceken patahekal tu simal, sapisanga' tu bangsisay simal, u balu atu maduhemay a heci kapah kanen, pawalien maacakay a balu hidaen u uciya sengelen malunananuman, yu mukasi sa, u kakitaan hanu u pudac nu bulad kama atu cica' nu kilang, palamelen tu yasiyang hananay padengen i masapululay sipabangsi tu dikuc. (kamu nu Hulam: .) ya kilang nida atekak kapah sipisanga' tu cungkul, ina, sakaluk nu malukay atu kawes nu takini', idaw ku nu tademaw a nipaluma sasalangatan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kasibaluan Kasibaluan nu datay, i sepatay a bulad ktukuh siwaay a bulad , kasihecian siwaay a bulad ktukuh sabaw tusaay a bulad. bulad kama a balu nida idaw ku micidek a sanenk nu bangsis. u bangsis niza mabahil tayda i mabaatbaatay kiyu idaw ku pituay a datay, siwaay a datay, cacay a bataan a datay, malebut a datay, emang a datay, kiyu pangangan cili-siang han. (kamu nu Hulam: .) lakalakan atu kakitidaan kauzipan sayaway a lalangawan i timulan nu Ya-cu , ayda malakalak i Tay-wan , Cung-ku , Liw-kiw , Hu-li-pin ..., itini i Cung-ku malakalak i Hay-nan , Kuang-tung , kakaudipan i namakabayu' ku sausi, i talakaway a buyu', i malahatay a kilang atu kilakilangan nu labu atu isasaay masawahelulay nu labu. manamuh tu alihaay suesuemetay a demiad, matalaw tu cueded, u sakapahay a nilangaw a undu sa i tusa a bataan katukuh i tusa a bataan izaw ku walu a undu, hinaadih i baebaetuan, i masa uncungay a bukelalan idaw tu malakalak itiza, ayda nu tademaw a nipaluma sapisalangat. maydih a paluma tu datay sa, pahecek han kapah tu, atu mahida nu paanip a pacelak a paluma, anu talakaw padeng mihacacay han mipenec a pacelak. pahecek han ku yadahay, nika sapahecek a kaway anu hida nu sapul kasenun sa tabaki malakilang tu, kyu katuuday a tademaw hida u sapul ku nipaluma niheni. (kamu nu Hulam: .) cilekay u misatalay a cilekay u engid misangida mutabu tu papah kiyu misadibu matabun ku papah sisimal siwacah a imelang, u kataylulu nu wawa micidek misanganga i angangan palawacu tu teban atu nikasibalu . (kamu nu Hulam: .) misitekeday a wayway bulad kama(datay) sa, u mihmihcaan sumilaway a kilang atu adidiay a kilang a nipalumma, talakaw sa cacay katukuh cacay a bataan a ii , u satalakaw nida makaalatu sawbaw tusa a kung-ce . (kamu nu Hulam: .) u kilang atu ciid macelah tu takuliyaway atu nuabuwan sisalengaay a kulit, idaw adidi' ku tamelac malikat, nayay ku banuh, nikalaliwasak nu ciid makudikudic tanayu sa yadah,adidiay masakimulu, u mabalatay mahida u tulaay sikalimucuay, ya saisasaay micapi tu masakimuluay a kaku, u kilang nida atekak. u balu nu datay u salengacay ku kulit nu balu niza, lima ku pihpih nu balu, i papabawan atu tapiingan nu akaway mucelak ku balu, masakawsuwa mucebal azihen ku balu kyu siey-sing-hwa-si han. salengacay a balu i tukun nu tangah, lalima ku pihpih mahida u tukiay, micungedus ku bangesis, kanahatu i pituay, cacay a bataan, katukuh malebut ku kabaat masanek ku bangesis niza, kiyu pangangan han tu ci-li-siang . yu mapelu' tu ku balu sa, tahekal ku mahidaay u tiekuk mahida u miladidtay, u caayay henay ka duhem a heci sumilaway ku kulit, maduhem satu namaka sumilaway mala nu kama a kulit. u datay kapah saiten maladumdumaay ku hekal nu wayway nida, kiyu hina adih i putaputahan mala langat nu liwliw nu luma'. u heci mahida u nuli, mahida u tiekuk kasakimulu, nu ayawan masadicem, anu maduhem sa na u sumilaway henay mala takuliyaway alaw mala sumahahay tu ku kulit, yadahay sa anu maacak mabuhecul nika u teban masadibu maselen sisimal, tanayu yaku cacay ktukuh tusa a Kung-bun , ahebal lima katukuh sabaw sepat a Kung-li , tabaki tu adidi tabaki ku sumad, ya sapalumaan cacay tu tusa, azihen ku pudac sa simahidaay u sikupaay a banuh. (kamu nu Hulam: .) micidekay a cacukaymasen datay, balu atu heci kapah kanen, u balu banawen sa pawalinen, kapah sipauciya malanum atu sipalamel misakabi tu lami' u kapahay a sapabangesis. caay kahatini a cacay, kapah sipisanga' tu sapabangsis a simal, u bangesi nu nalu mitalaw ku likes atu lalangaw, mamin ku kulang sakala sapaiyu, yu namapateku sumilaw sa, kapah sapaculil tu idang masusud ku nika tekuan. nu labu nu udip a sapaiyu sa, mikapah tu bituka a adada, makahung adada ku ukak, u datay a zayliw nu sapaiyu kapahay, kapah sapisanga' tu sapisakakawaw nu malukay, sipisanga' tu cungkul, ina, u kapahay a zayliw ku datay. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u sapaiyu sapihica bulad kama(datay) u papah atu mangaduay a ciid ku sasanga'an malasapaiyu, u sanek aledah, adidi ku akenek, dihemay, idaw adidi ku duku, u balucu, atay, bala, u cayay katatudung nu udip amana picukaymas, mahiniay sapisanga' tu sapaiyu a zayliw i Kuwang-si , Kuwang-tung , Hu-cyin a kakitidaan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kapahay a kakitidaan datay sa, sakapahay padengen i sicilalay, kapahay ku hekal nu bali a kakitidaan, i liwliw nu luma' mapacilalay a kakitidaan, kiya kapah ku nilangaw nicelak nida, u papah sumilaw takelal sa. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam śúąś©ė yuechu śúąś©ė(Ś≠łŚźć:Murraya paniculata), ,Á®ģŚä†Ť©ěpaniculata śĄŹÁāļ"ŚúďťĆźŤäĪŚļŹŚľŹÁöĄ". u sulit nu Lipun „ā≤„ÉÉ„ā≠„ÉĄ(śúąś©ė,Murraya paniculata) . u sulit nu Amilika Murraya paniculata is a tropical, evergreen plant native to southern China, Taiwan, the Indian sub-continent (i.e. Bangladesh, India, Nepal, north-eastern Pakistan and Sri Lanka), south-eastern Asia (i.e. Cambodia, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, Malaysia and the Philippines and northern Australia (i.e. the northern parts of the Northern Territory, far northern Queensland and northern Western Australia), bearing small, white, scented flowers, which is grown as an ornamental tree or hedge. Murraya is closely related to Citrus, and bears small orange to red fruit resembling kumquats, though some cultivars do not set fruit.
S.PHON: == dataj == dataj , mauzip i isasa Ē~ ° nu buju, ¶aaj katakar~…ĺaw nu baju Ē~ °. jadańß i …ônar~…ĺ. kja kir~…ĺaŇč sa, ńßar~…ĺi pasaŇča Ē~ ° tu pana Ē~ °. at…ôkak ku kir~…ĺaŇč. katuud tu pa ¶akaj tu kir~…ĺaŇč atu sapar~…ĺ a pa ¶akajaj.jadańß ku ŇčaŇčan kina kir~…ĺaŇč. tan…ôŇč tu paazińß, par~…ĺaŇčat i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma bur~…ĺad kama bur~…ĺad kama, mit…ôs…ôkaj a nipaŇčaŇčna : murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata, duma a ŇčaŇčansa u dataj ńßan, siwaaj dataj , ¶a ¶aj a bataan dataj , mar~…ĺ…ôbut dataj, maŇč dataj, siwaaj bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan dataj, mamin ku bujubujuan baŇč…ôsis a dataj, siwaaj kir~…ĺaŇč dataj,mar~…ĺ…ôbut mata, maŇč mata nitii Ē~ °kan, mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶iid sipapańßaj, aŇčtur~…ĺaj mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mata, adidiaj maŇč sumir~…ĺawaj kir~…ĺaŇč, sumir~…ĺawaj kir~…ĺaŇč a baŇčsis, s…ôpataj puu Ē~ ° baŇčsis, s…ôpat puu Ē~ ° kama, s…ôr~…ĺiŇč a dataj, s…ôńßun ńßatiza. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**,**:murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata. , .) u dataj nu papańß anu m…ôtm…ôt…ôn, idawk u mi ¶id…ôkaj a baŇčsis mańßida u kama mami ku san…ôk, kiju pituaj a dataj ńßan, u i ¶u ¶uwa tu masan…ôk ku baŇčsi nida sananaj, duma paŇčaŇčan sa bur~…ĺad kama. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: "**","**".) u iŇč- ¶iaŇč-k…ô a kaput, siwaaj dataj su a nipar~…ĺuma, u bar~…ĺu nu bur~…ĺad kama kapańß ¶…ôk ¶…ôk…ôn patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu simar~…ĺ, sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu baŇčsisaj simar~…ĺ, u bar~…ĺu atu maduńß…ômaj a ńß…ô ¶i kapańß kan…ôn, pawar~…ĺi…ôn maa ¶akaj a bar~…ĺu ńßida…ôn u u ¶ija s…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôn mar~…ĺunananuman, ju mukasi sa, u kakitaan ńßanu u puda ¶ nu bur~…ĺad kama atu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇč, par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ…ôn tu jasijaŇč ńßananaj pad…ôŇč…ôn i masapur~…ĺur~…ĺaj sipabaŇčsi tu diku ¶. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ja kir~…ĺaŇč nida at…ôkak kapańß sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶uŇčkur~…ĺ, ina, sakar~…ĺuk nu mar~…ĺukaj atu kaw…ôs nu takini Ē~ °, idaw ku nu tad…ômaw a nipar~…ĺuma sasar~…ĺaŇčatan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kasibar~…ĺuan kasibar~…ĺuan nu dataj, i s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad ktukuńß siwaaj a bur~…ĺad , kasińß…ô ¶ian siwaaj a bur~…ĺad ktukuńß sabaw tusaaj a bur~…ĺad. bur~…ĺad kama a bar~…ĺu nida idaw ku mi ¶id…ôk a san…ônk nu baŇčsis. u baŇčsis niza mabańßir~…ĺ tajda i mabaatbaataj kiju idaw ku pituaj a dataj, siwaaj a dataj, ¶a ¶aj a bataan a dataj, mar~…ĺ…ôbut a dataj, …ômaŇč a dataj, kiju paŇčaŇčan ¶ir~…ĺi-siaŇč ńßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) r~…ĺakar~…ĺakan atu kakitidaan kauzipan sajawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan i timur~…ĺan nu ja- ¶u , ajda mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i taj-wan , ¶uŇč-ku , r~…ĺiw-kiw , ńßu-r~…ĺi-pin ..., itini i ¶uŇč-ku mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i ńßaj-nan , kuaŇč-tuŇč , kakaudipan i namakabaju Ē~ ° ku sausi, i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, i mar~…ĺańßataj a kir~…ĺaŇč atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nu r~…ĺabu atu isasaaj masawańß…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺabu. manamuńß tu ar~…ĺińßaaj su…ôsu…ôm…ôtaj a d…ômiad, matar~…ĺaw tu ¶u…ôd…ôd, u sakapańßaj a nir~…ĺaŇčaw a undu sa i tusa a bataan katukuńß i tusa a bataan izaw ku war~…ĺu a undu, ńßinaadińß i ba…ôba…ôtuan, i masa un ¶uŇčaj a buk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan idaw tu mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak itiza, ajda nu tad…ômaw a nipar~…ĺuma sapisar~…ĺaŇčat. majdińß a par~…ĺuma tu dataj sa, pańß…ô ¶…ôk ńßan kapańß tu, atu mańßida nu paanip a pa ¶…ôr~…ĺak a par~…ĺuma, anu tar~…ĺakaw pad…ôŇč mińßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan mip…ôn…ô ¶ a pa ¶…ôr~…ĺak. pańß…ô ¶…ôk ńßan ku jadańßaj, nika sapańß…ô ¶…ôk a kawaj anu ńßida nu sapur~…ĺ kas…ônun sa tabaki mar~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇč tu, kju katuudaj a tad…ômaw ńßida u sapur~…ĺ ku nipar~…ĺuma nińß…ôni. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj u misatar~…ĺaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj u …ôŇčid misaŇčida mutabu tu papańß kiju misadibu matabun ku papańß sisimar~…ĺ siwa ¶ańß a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u katajr~…ĺur~…ĺu nu wawa mi ¶id…ôk misaŇčaŇča i aŇčaŇčan par~…ĺawa ¶u tu t…ôban atu nikasibar~…ĺu . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) misit…ôk…ôdaj a wajwaj bur~…ĺad kama(dataj) sa, u mińßmińß ¶aan sumir~…ĺawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč atu adidiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč a nipar~…ĺumma, tar~…ĺakaw sa ¶a ¶aj katukuńß ¶a ¶aj a bataan a ii , u satar~…ĺakaw nida makaar~…ĺatu sawbaw tusa a kuŇč- ¶…ô . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u kir~…ĺaŇč atu ¶iid ma ¶…ôr~…ĺańß tu takur~…ĺijawaj atu nuabuwan sisar~…ĺ…ôŇčaaj a kur~…ĺit, idaw adidi Ē~ ° ku tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺikat, najaj ku banuńß, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak nu ¶iid makudikudi ¶ tanaju sa jadańß,adidiaj masakimur~…ĺu, u mabar~…ĺataj mańßida u tur~…ĺaaj sikar~…ĺimu ¶uaj, ja saisasaaj mi ¶api tu masakimur~…ĺuaj a kaku, u kir~…ĺaŇč nida at…ôkak. u bar~…ĺu nu dataj u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit nu bar~…ĺu niza, r~…ĺima ku pińßpińß nu bar~…ĺu, i papabawan atu tapiiŇčan nu akawaj mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu, masakawsuwa mu ¶…ôbar~…ĺ azińß…ôn ku bar~…ĺu kju si…ô-siŇč-ńßwa-si ńßan. sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a bar~…ĺu i tukun nu taŇčańß, r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku pińßpińß mańßida u tukiaj, mi ¶uŇč…ôdus ku baŇč…ôsis, kanańßatu i pituaj, ¶a ¶aj a bataan, katukuńß mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku kabaat masan…ôk ku baŇč…ôsis niza, kiju paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶i-r~…ĺi-siaŇč . ju map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu ku bar~…ĺu sa, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku mańßidaaj u ti…ôkuk mańßida u mir~…ĺadidtaj, u ¶aajaj ńß…ônaj ka duńß…ôm a ńß…ô ¶i sumir~…ĺawaj ku kur~…ĺit, maduńß…ôm satu namaka sumir~…ĺawaj mar~…ĺa nu kama a kur~…ĺit. u dataj kapańß sait…ôn mar~…ĺadumdumaaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu wajwaj nida, kiju ńßina adińß i putaputańßan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺaŇčat nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. u ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u nur~…ĺi, mańßida u ti…ôkuk kasakimur~…ĺu, nu ajawan masadi ¶…ôm, anu maduńß…ôm sa na u sumir~…ĺawaj ńß…ônaj mar~…ĺa takur~…ĺijawaj ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺa sumańßańßaj tu ku kur~…ĺit, jadańßaj sa anu maa ¶ak mabuńß…ô ¶ur~…ĺ nika u t…ôban masadibu mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôn sisimar~…ĺ, tanaju jaku ¶a ¶aj ktukuńß tusa a kuŇč-bun , ańß…ôbar~…ĺ r~…ĺima katukuńß sabaw s…ôpat a kuŇč-r~…ĺi , tabaki tu adidi tabaki ku sumad, ja sapar~…ĺumaan ¶a ¶aj tu tusa, azińß…ôn ku puda ¶ sa simańßidaaj u sikupaaj a banuńß. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶a ¶ukajmas…ôn dataj, bar~…ĺu atu ńß…ô ¶i kapańß kan…ôn, u bar~…ĺu banaw…ôn sa pawar~…ĺin…ôn, kapańß sipau ¶ija mar~…ĺanum atu sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ misakabi tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° u kapańßaj a sapabaŇč…ôsis. ¶aaj kańßatini a ¶a ¶aj, kapańß sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapabaŇčsis a simar~…ĺ, u baŇč…ôsi nu nar~…ĺu mitar~…ĺaw ku r~…ĺik…ôs atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw, mamin ku kur~…ĺaŇč sakar~…ĺa sapaiju, ju namapat…ôku sumir~…ĺaw sa, kapańß sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu idaŇč masusud ku nika t…ôkuan. nu r~…ĺabu nu udip a sapaiju sa, mikapańß tu bituka a adada, makańßuŇč adada ku ukak, u dataj a zajr~…ĺiw nu sapaiju kapańßaj, kapańß sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapisakakawaw nu mar~…ĺukaj, sipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶uŇčkur~…ĺ, ina, u kapańßaj a zajr~…ĺiw ku dataj. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u sapaiju sapińßi ¶a bur~…ĺad kama(dataj) u papańß atu maŇčaduaj a ¶iid ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an mar~…ĺasapaiju, u san…ôk ar~…ĺ…ôdańß, adidi ku ak…ôn…ôk, dińß…ômaj, idaw adidi ku duku, u bar~…ĺu ¶u, ataj, bar~…ĺa, u ¶ajaj katatuduŇč nu udip amana pi ¶ukajmas, mańßiniaj sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapaiju a zajr~…ĺiw i kuwaŇč-si , kuwaŇč-tuŇč , ńßu- ¶jin a kakitidaan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kapańßaj a kakitidaan dataj sa, sakapańßaj pad…ôŇč…ôn i si ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj, kapańßaj ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi a kakitidaan, i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj a kakitidaan, kija kapańß ku nir~…ĺaŇčaw ni ¶…ôr~…ĺak nida, u papańß sumir~…ĺaw tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ sa. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ** ju…ô ¶ńßu **(**:murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata), ,***pani ¶ur~…ĺata **"******". u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun ****(**,murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata) . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika murraja pani ¶ur~…ĺata is a tropi ¶ar~…ĺ, …ô*…ôrgr…ô…ôn pr~…ĺant nati*…ô to soutńß…ôrn ¶ńßina, taiwan, tńß…ô indian sub- ¶ontin…ônt (i.…ô. baŇčr~…ĺad…ôsńß, india, n…ôpar~…ĺ, nortńß-…ôast…ôrn pakistan and sri r~…ĺanka), soutńß-…ôast…ôrn asia (i.…ô. ¶ambodia, r~…ĺaos, mjanmar, tńßair~…ĺand, *i…ôtnam, indon…ôsia, mar~…ĺajsia and tńß…ô pńßir~…ĺippin…ôs and nortńß…ôrn austrar~…ĺia (i.…ô. tńß…ô nortńß…ôrn parts of tńß…ô nortńß…ôrn t…ôrritorj, far nortńß…ôrn *u…ô…ônsr~…ĺand and nortńß…ôrn w…ôst…ôrn austrar~…ĺia), b…ôariŇč smar~…ĺr~…ĺ, wńßit…ô, s ¶…ônt…ôd fr~…ĺow…ôrs, wńßi ¶ńß is grown as an ornam…ôntar~…ĺ tr…ô…ô or ńß…ôdg…ô. murraja is ¶r~…ĺos…ôr~…ĺj r…ôr~…ĺat…ôd to ¶itrus, and b…ôars smar~…ĺr~…ĺ oraŇč…ô to r…ôd fruit r…ôs…ômbr~…ĺiŇč kum*uats, tńßougńß som…ô ¶ur~…ĺti*ars do not s…ôt fruit.
